name: civicledger
description: CivicLedger Phase 1 - Core Reporting & Triage (serverless monorepo)

scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @civicledger/shared && npm run typecheck -w @civicledger/server && npm run typecheck -w @civicledger/client

_comment_optionalDeps: Linux SWC binaries for @swc/core (used by the workflow build plugin) are pinned below so package-lock captures them for Linux CI; npm skips them on other platforms.
